svg.text: Maya Headless Automation — Build a Full Prism + Maya Pipeline in One Graph
Initialises PrismCore — shared across all nodes
entity + dept + task + app → saved_path v0007
ACTION NODES — build a list of instructions. Nothing runs yet.
Each node appends one dict to the actions[ ] list.
queries scene metadata — name, poly count, frame range
⚡ Nothing has executed yet. This is a pure data list.
maya_headless fires it all at once in Stage 3.
→ executes ALL actions in one session
reads from executed_actions output of maya_headless
data: result → prints to node log panel
Prism registers v0008 — ready for next pipeline run
